safe_claims: A persistent transit-like signal is present in six 120-s TESS sectors.
A giant-planet-sized scale is conditional on a planetary event originating on the catalog target and on the catalog single-star assumptions.
The phase-folded transit fit is a descriptive reference, not an adopted native-cadence posterior.
A converged fit-window sensitivity comparison shows that the descriptive statistical intervals do not include window choice.
Formal sector-depth errors reject a constant-depth model, but the cause is not assigned as astrophysical.
No calibrated population false-positive probability is reported.
The object remains an unvalidated and unconfirmed candidate.
No Zenodo DOI is claimed until the corrected package deposit resolves successfully.
unsafe_claims: The density mismatch is a calibrated 4.3-sigma discovery.
The eccentricity is measured near 0.28 or 0.31.
The transit source is formally localized to the target.
The candidate is dynamically confirmed or has a measured mass.
material_incomplete_controls: Converged native-cadence circular and eccentric transit posteriors.
Marginalized correlated-noise, baseline, and residual-dilution parameters.
A Phase 6 joint noise fit passing the frozen stationarity gate in all 24 branches.
A principled fit-window model or uncertainty term covering the observed window sensitivity.
Coherent passband-integrated atmosphere and isochrone posterior with mass-radius covariance.
Secondary-eclipse scan over eccentric orbital phases.
Calibrated TESS PRF source-localization likelihood and contrast curve.
Target-specific epoch radial velocities or equivalent dynamical evidence.
AASTeX conversion and a newly compiled canonical PDF.
Regenerated scientific and mathematical audits against the final source.
Verified Zenodo deposit and resolvable DOI for a future corrected release.

blocking_reasons: A passband-integrated atmosphere and isochrone stellar posterior is not complete.
Formal sector heterogeneity has not yet been closed as WP-09A.
The transit source remains unresolved without calibrated PRF localization and external imaging.
The existing release mathematical audit and SHA-256 manifest intentionally predate the Path-B TeX rewrite.
